## Summary

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs / branding

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. Closes #123 — or "n/a" -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Change is focused and matches the surrounding style
- [ ] `bash -n alexa_cameras/run.sh` passes
- [ ] `python3 -m py_compile alexa_cameras/ui.py` passes
- [ ] User-facing change? Bumped `version:` in `alexa_cameras/config.yaml` **and** added a `CHANGELOG.md` entry
- [ ] Any new/updated screenshots are **masked** (no real IPs, domains, passwords, or tokens)
- [ ] Art change? Regenerated with `branding/generate_branding.py` (didn't hand-edit the PNGs)
